summary: Iteration 14 Testing Complete - MySpace Profile Customization, User Blocking/Reporting, and Logout button features tested. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features tested and working. Fixed missing /profile/:petId route in App.js, added missing /api/pets/{petId}/posts and /api/friends endpoints, and added profile_theme to owner info in pets API.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Profile route was missing from App.js - added /profile/:petId route
Fixed: /api/posts/pet/{petId} endpoint was missing - added /api/pets/{petId}/posts endpoint
Fixed: /api/friends/{petId} endpoint was missing - created friends.py route file
Fixed: owner.profile_theme was not returned in /api/pets/{petId} - added to owner_info
Block/Report buttons correctly show only for non-owners on profile page
Report modal has 5 reason options: Spam, Harassment, Inappropriate, Scam, Other
Admin reports queue correctly filters by status (pending/all)
Feed correctly filters out blocked users' posts
seed_data_creation: Created test user testuser_profile@test.com with pet pet_9868effcd6e9 for profile testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 14 features working: 1) Settings page has Logout button in Account tab (data-testid='settings-logout-btn'). 2) Settings Theme tab has 8 background presets (bg-preset-0 through bg-preset-7), music URL input, and background image URL input. 3) Profile page shows block/report buttons for non-owners. 4) Report modal works with 5 reason options. 5) Backend blocking/reporting APIs all working. 6) Feed correctly filters blocked users' posts. 7) Chat widget has drag functionality with cursor-grab class and GripVertical icon.

backend_feed_filtering.GET /api/feed/posts: Working - filters out blocked users' posts

backend_theme.PUT /api/auth/theme: Working - saves profile theme with video_bg_url and music_url

frontend_chat.drag_functionality: Working - cursor-grab class and GripVertical icon present

bugs_fixed_during_testing.missing_profile_theme: Added profile_theme to owner info in pets API
